"[8] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY UPDATE IN BEVERLY HILLS: THE EB AND WB LANES OF WILSHIRE BLVD ARE NOW OPEN. NB AND SB LANES OF LA CIENEGA BLVD WILL BE BLOCKED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF BEVERLY HILLS POLICE DEPARTMENT. "
"[9] PER BEVERLY HILLS PD VIA LL EB AND WB WILSHIRE BLVD LANES ARE OPEN. NB AND SB LANES ON LA CIENEGA ARE STILL CLOSED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE"

I-605 SB FROM BEVERLY TO WHITTIER #3 AND #4 LANES / AND SB 605 TO BEVERLY OFF AND WHITTIER OFF CLOSED. WE WILL BE WORKING UNTIL APPROX 0600 HOURS BUT THIS IS FOR A 55 HR CLOSURE"
